meta.description: How the brain gets real-time and historical market data over the network: Deriv WebSocket API endpoints, message formats, and data handling rules.

derivWebSocketAPI.note: Register a free app_id at api.deriv.com. Public market data (ticks, candles) does not require account authorization.

tickStream.description: Subscribe to live ticks for a symbol.
tickStream.receive: stream of { tick: { symbol, quote, epoch } }

candleHistory.receive: { candles: [{ open, high, low, close, epoch }] }

candleStream.receive: stream of { ohlc: { open, high, low, close, epoch, granularity } }

activeSymbols.description: List all tradable symbols with metadata.

rules: Send { ping: 1 } every 30 seconds to keep the socket alive.
On disconnect: exponential backoff reconnect (1s, 2s, 4s, ... max 60s) and re-subscribe all streams.
Queue outgoing requests while reconnecting; flush on open.
Track subscription ids so streams can be cleanly forgotten.
Validate every message has no 'error' field before processing; log errors with code and message.

steps: 1. On symbol selected: fetch candleHistory for ALL timeframes (M1, M5, M15, H1, H4, D1).
2. Subscribe to tick stream + M1 candle stream.
3. Aggregate live ticks into the current candle; roll higher timeframe candles from M1 closes.
4. Recompute indicators incrementally on each candle close (not every tick, except spike detection which uses ticks).
5. Re-run full analysis pipeline on every M1 close; re-run bias on every M15 close.
6. Cache candles locally so restarts don't refetch everything.
dataPipeline.candleAggregation: Higher TF candle: open = first M1 open of window, close = last M1 close, high = max highs, low = min lows.
freshnessRules: Never analyse with stale data: if last tick is older than 10 seconds, flag data as stale and suppress signals.
Timestamp every signal with the data epoch it was computed from.

fallbackSources.note: For non-synthetic instruments (forex, crypto), the app may also use:

options.name: Twelve Data / Alpha Vantage REST
options.use: forex candles, requires free API key

fallbackSources.rule: Deriv synthetics data MUST come from the Deriv API only — no other source has these symbols.

errorHandling: RateLimit error -> backoff 60s, reduce request frequency.
MarketIsClosed -> only applies to non-synthetics; synthetics are 24/7.
InvalidSymbol -> re-fetch activeSymbols and correct the code via conversation.json entity map.
